name: DXP ENTERPRISES INC
summary: Company Overview Founded in 1908, DXP Enterprises, Inc. (together with our subsidiaries, hereinafter referred to as DXP or the Company or by the terms such as we, our, or us) was incorporated in Texas in 1996 to be the successor to SEPCO Industries, Inc.
